name: Metro Medical
description_short: Cardinal Health is a pharmaceutical and medical supply distributor providing diagnostic equipment, pharmaceuticals, and medical supplies to healthcare providers and facilities.
description_long:
Metro Medical operates as a B2B ordering portal for Cardinal Health, one of the largest healthcare distributors in North America. The company functions as a wholesale supplier rather than a consumer finance provider, distributing pharmaceuticals, diagnostic equipment, and medical supplies to healthcare institutions, clinics, and medical practices.

The platform offers online ordering for multiple product categories including ambient, refrigerated, frozen, and controlled pharmaceuticals. Customers can access specialized product lines organized by medical specialty including nephrology, rheumatology, neurology, ophthalmology, gastroenterology, and allergy/asthma. The service includes accounts receivable support, dedicated customer service, and compliance assistance for healthcare distributors and providers.

The company distinguishes itself through DSCSA (Drug Supply Chain Security Act) compliance support and regulatory guidance, reflecting its position as a licensed pharmaceutical distributor. The platform maintains infrastructure for secure customer verification and fraud prevention, with dedicated teams for accounts receivable and customer support. They actively monitor supply chain disruptions and communicate proactively about service impacts.

This company was miscategorized as a payday alternative and should not appear on a consumer finance platform. Metro Medical is a B2B pharmaceutical distributor serving healthcare institutions, not a consumer lending or financial services provider. No consumer financial products, loans, credit services, or cash advance offerings exist on this platform.
services: Pharmaceutical distribution and ordering (ambient, refrigerated, frozen, controlled products)
Accounts receivable management and billing support
DSCSA compliance reporting and FDA guidance
Specialty medical product lines (nephrology, rheumatology, neurology, ophthalmology, gastroenterology, allergy/asthma)
User verification and fraud prevention services
Online ordering portal and account management
Supply chain disruption monitoring and communication
pros: Specializes in DSCSA compliance support and FDA guidance for pharmaceutical distribution
Dedicated accounts receivable team (833.380.0339) for business billing support
Multiple product temperature categories (ambient, refrigerated, frozen, controlled) for specialized storage needs
Organized by medical specialty (nephrology, rheumatology, neurology, ophthalmology, gastroenterology, allergy/asthma)
Fraud prevention and user verification systems for secure ordering
Proactive communication about supply chain disruptions and service updates
24/7 customer service hotline (1.800.768.2002) for ordering assistance
cons: Not a consumer finance company—completely misclassified on CreditDoc as a payday alternative
Serves only B2B healthcare institutions, not individual consumers seeking financial products
Limited publicly available information about specific product pricing or terms on website
Requires special login credentials for DSCSA reporting access, creating barriers to transparency
Website is B2B-focused with no consumer-facing financial products or services
best_for: Healthcare institutions and medical practices requiring pharmaceutical wholesale distribution
Clinics and diagnostic centers needing medical equipment and supplies
Pharmacy providers requiring DSCSA-compliant supply chain management
diagnosis: Metro Medical is a B2B pharmaceutical and medical supply distributor owned by Cardinal Health, not a consumer finance provider. This company should not be categorized on CreditDoc at all, as it serves healthcare institutions exclusively and offers no consumer lending, credit, or financial products of any kind.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
